news.summary: IDEX Corp., a company listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol IEX and headquartered in Northbrook, Illinois, has declared its 122nd consecutive quarterly dividend. The regular cash dividend amounts to $0.71 per common share.
news.headline: IDEX Corp (NYSE:IEX) declares $0.71 cash dividend per share, marking 122nd consecutive quarterly dividend.

news.summary: Michelle, an experienced legal professional, has joined Wealthfront in Palo Alto, California. With over 25 years of experience, she will be guiding the tech-driven financial platform, helping young professionals with savings. This news was announced on May 8, 2025, through PRNewswire.
news.headline: Wealthfront appoints Michelle Wilson to Board of Directors, with 25+ years experience. - Palo Alto, CA. 08/05/2025.

news.summary: In Winston-Salem, North Carolina, on May 8, 2025, a top provider of construction jobsite camera solutions, TrueLook, introduced two new fixed cameras: the compact 2K IR and detailed 8K IR models. Additionally, they launched updated subscription plans, aiming to offer construction teams enhanced options for monitoring projects.
news.headline: TrueLook introduces 2 new fixed cameras (2K IR, 8K IR) and subscription plans for construction teams.

news.summary: In a recent event held in Las Vegas, Delene Gilbert, the Vice President and Director of Cannabis Banking at Prism Bank in Oklahoma City, was chosen as a keynote speaker at the Financial Brand Forum 2025. This recognition showcases Gilbert's extensive knowledge and experience in the cannabis industry. The event gathered notable professionals to discuss key topics, showing the growing importance of cannabis banking.
news.headline: Prism Bank's Delene Gilbert, VP of Cannabis Banking, speaks at Financial Brand Forum 2025 in Las Vegas.

news.summary: Hahn, an integrated marketing communications agency based in Austin, Texas, has recently been acknowledged for its outstanding leadership in essential brand communications and innovation. The agency was honored to be recognized as one of the Top 80 Agencies in the United States for the year 2025 by PRovoke Media. This recognition showcases Hahn's dedication to excellence in the field and emphasizes its contribution to the industry.
news.headline: Hahn agency named Top 80 Agencies in the US by PRovoke Media, highlighting leadership in brand comms.

news.summary: Expedient has been acknowledged by Nutanix for providing top-tier Nutanix private cloud, disaster recovery, and edge computing solutions, in addition to a range of cloud and managed services that support businesses. The recognition was made in Washington on May 8, 2025. The partnership between Expedient and Nutanix highlights the exceptional quality of services offered, with a focus on empowering businesses.
news.headline: Expedient named Americas Service Provider of the Year at Nutanix event for top-notch services.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Los Angeles, the nonprofit WholeSchool Mindfulness, which aims to integrate mindfulness into education, was awarded a grant from Unlikely Collaborators. The grant will aid in establishing Mindfulness Directors at a high school and university. The initiative seeks to bring mindfulness practices to a wider audience, reaching students and staff to promote well-being and mental health.
news.headline: WholeSchool Mindfulness gets grant from Unlikely Collaborators to expand mindfulness in education by creating Mindfulness Directors at a high school and university.

news.summary: Missouri House Bill 594, designed to eliminate the state's capital gains tax, has been approved by Missouri's House of Representatives and awaits Governor Mike Kehoe's signature. The bill offers a 100% income tax deduction on capital gains as Missouri's tax code does not differentiate between capital gains and regular income. Attorney Aaron Brogan describes the bill's uniqueness, comparing it to the federal SALT deduction where individuals can deduct state and local taxes. This bill contrasts with proposals by President Trump to overhaul the US tax system by potentially eliminating federal income tax and replacing revenue through import tariffs, targeting those earning under $200,000. The market has responded negatively to these tariff propositions, causing trillions of dollars in stock market losses and impacting crypto markets as bond yields also rose. Despite this, there is optimism for the future in the crypto industry as concerns of financial nihilism fade.
news.headline: Missouri bill abolishing capital gains tax approved by House, heads to Governor for signature. 100% income tax deduction proposed for capital gains. Trillions lost in stock market and crypto post proposal to eliminate federal income tax. Bond yields surge as investors shun US bonds. Time for bold financial dreams in crypto.
The Kremlin sees a constructive charge in the statements of US Vice President Vance, Ushakov noted.

news.summary: The price of Bitcoin has surpassed $100,000, marking a significant milestone in the cryptocurrency market. Additionally, Coinbase has announced plans to acquire a crypto options trading platform in a deal valued at $2.9 billion. With this move, Coinbase aims to expand its offerings and services in the growing digital asset market. In related news, various crypto stocks are testing buy points as strategies are being developed to launch spot Bitcoin ETFs. These developments signal a continued interest and investment in the cryptocurrency space among both retail and institutional investors.
news.headline: Bitcoin price hits $100,000, Coinbase in $2.9 billion deal for crypto platform, stocks showing buy signals.

news.summary: On Thursday, the stock of ADMA Biologics experienced a sharp decline following the biotech company's slight underperformance in meeting the first-quarter expectations of analysts. This downturn resulted in a double-digit drop in ADMA's stock value, causing concerns among investors. This significant decrease in stock value occurred despite ADMA being ranked as the No. 2 stock on the IBD 50 list. This turn of events highlights the volatility and uncertainty present in the biotech sector, as even top-performing companies like ADMA can face challenges meeting market expectations.
news.headline: ADMA Biologics stock dropped by double digits after missing Q1 expectations, impacting its ranking as No. 2 on IBD 50.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025 in Ottawa, the Acoustical Society of America is set to conduct three press conferences on Tuesday, May 20. These conferences will be held at the Bachus Room on the New Orleans Marriott Hotel's fourth floor. The event is titled the ASA and ICA joint meeting. It will be open for both in-person attendance and virtual participation.
news.headline: ASA to host three press conferences on May 20 at New Orleans Marriott Hotel. Available in-person and virtually. #ASA188

news.summary: In Dublin, the "Diesel Generator Market Size and Share Analysis - Growth Trends and Forecast Report 2025-2033" has recently been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The diesel gensets market is anticipated to see significant growth, increasing from $19.69 billion in 2024 to $36.33 billion by 2033. This growth is expected to occur at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.04% between 2025 and 2033. One of the key drivers for this growth is the rising demand for reliable power supply, particularly in sectors such as healthcare and telecommunications, where frequent power outages necessitate backup power sources.
news.headline: Diesel generator market to reach $36.33 billion by 2033, with a CAGR of 7.04% driven by oil and gas sector growth.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, McEwen Mining Inc. announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2025, ending on March 31st. The company's stocks, listed as NYSE: MUX and TSX: MUX, were the subject of the report.
news.headline: McEwen Mining reports Q1 2025 results in Toronto, with stock symbol NYSE: MUX, TSX: MUX.

news.summary: Luxury home builder Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL) has revealed plans for its upcoming community, Coldwater Ridge of Northville, set to launch in Northville, Michigan. The development will showcase premium condos within a serene wooded area for a perfect blend of peace and accessibility. Situated at the intersection of 5 Mile & Ridge Roads, Coldwater Ridge of Northville is currently undergoing site preparations and is slated for sale commencement in the latter part of summer 2025.
news.headline: Toll Brothers to open luxury home community, Coldwater Ridge of Northville, Michigan at 5 Mile & Ridge Roads in late summer 2025.

news.summary: The latest report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.6% in June, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. The number of jobs added during this period totaled 250,000, exceeding economists' expectations. Additionally, the average hourly earnings rose by 2.5% compared to last year. These figures demonstrate a positive trend in the labor market, signaling potential economic growth in the upcoming months.
news.headline: Officials consider expediting deals with Gulf wealth funds under Trump administration

news.summary: Stocks in the U.S. saw gains in midday trading, with the Nasdaq Composite soaring by over 300 points on Thursday. The Dow rose by 1.50% to reach 41,729.20, while the NASDAQ increased by 1.91% to hit 18,076.43. The S&P 500 also experienced a rise of 1.44% to reach 5,712.61. Energy sector shares climbed by 1.2% on Thursday, while health care stocks fell by 0.9%. US Foods Holding Corp. (NYSE: USFD) reported lower-than-expected earnings for the first quarter, with earnings of 68 cents per share missing the analyst consensus estimate of 69 cents per share. The company's quarterly sales of $9.35 billion also missed estimates of $9.38 billion. SunOpta Inc (NASDAQ: STKL) saw a significant increase of 30% in its shares. For more on this story, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: US stocks rise; Nasdaq gains over 300 points. Dow up 1.50% to 41,729.20, NASDAQ up 1.91% to 18,076.43, S&P 500 up 1.44% to 5,712.61. US Foods reports Q1 earnings miss. Energy sector up by 1.2%, healthcare down by 0.9%. SunOpta Inc shares up by 30%.

news.summary: Dental support organization Positive Impact Dental, located in Oklahoma, has appointed Christopher Blann and Ed Dallwein as its Chief Operating Officer and Chief Financial Officer, respectively. The announcement was made on May 8, 2025. Positive Impact Dental, a reputable DSO founded by dentists, continues to strengthen its operations with seasoned professionals at the helm.
news.headline: Positive Impact Dental names Christopher Blann and Ed Dallwein as COO and CFO, to drive growth. Dentist-founded DSO expanding leadership team.

news.summary: The value of Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has surged by 12% in the last 24 hours, sparking increased activity in derivatives trading. Analyst Ali Martinez pointed out that DOGE has consistently followed a support trendline since October 2024. If the price falls to $0.14, it could be a favorable moment for investors to buy in, with a potential future surge to $0.30. This trendline has been a key support for #Dogecoin $DOGE since October 2024. A drop to $0.14 might offer a chance to purchase before a possible rise. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Dogecoin rises 12%, reaching $0.14, sparking surge in derivatives activity. Technical analysis suggests potential climb to $0.30.

news.summary: A recent partnership has been formed to offer advertisers the opportunity to reach a vast audience of outdoor and RV enthusiasts. AllGear Digital, a prominent publisher specializing in outdoor and active lifestyle brands, has joined forces with RVshare, the top online platform for RV rentals. This collaboration will provide advertisers with access to millions of individuals within these demographics. The announcement was made on May 8, 2025, in Los Angeles.
news.headline: RVshare has joined AllGear Digital's advertising network, expanding advertiser reach to millions of outdoor and RV enthusiasts. Announcement made on May 8, 2025.

news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas, on May 8, 2025, TimelyCare, a leading virtual health and well-being provider for higher education institutions, has reaffirmed its position as one of the top global health tech companies. TimelyCare offers tailored and evidence-based care that enhances the well-being of students.
news.headline: TimelyCare named "Best Virtual Care Solution" by MedTech Breakthrough in 2025 for delivering personalized care to students.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh, IRALOGIX, a top fintech provider in the retirement industry, celebrated its 10th year in operation, highlighting ten years of progress, creativity, and influence in transforming how the wealth management sector caters to retirement savers. Peter de Silva, the CEO, emphasized the company's distinctiveness in harmonizing innovation with implementation, stating, "We are committed to enhancing our services while prioritizing solutions to practical challenges." This milestone serves as an opportunity to not only commemorate the company's journey so far, but also as a reminder of their commitment to continual enhancement.
news.headline: IRALOGIX celebrates 10 years reshaping wealth management, CEO Peter de Silva highlights innovation and execution.
